afterSnapshot.name: computeRoutePlan
afterSnapshot.purpose: Compute per-leg distance, bearing, duration and cumulative ETA for an ordered list of route points at a constant boat speed.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Route geometry/ETA must be computed server-side in a pure, directly unit-testable function so the same call can later attach weather warnings.
implementation: Mirrors the app's pure-function style (like computeBestWindow): no network/closure deps, defensive guards, 1-decimal rounding. Haversine in nm + initial great-circle bearing per leg.
